title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and Python/JavaScript libraries to pull and run Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally with one command.

title: ollama/ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for the Ollama server; chat, generate, embed, list, pull, and delete models from Node or the browser.

title: ollama/ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, list, pull, and delete models with async/sync APIs.

title: jmorganca/ollama
summary: PyPI landing page for the official ollama Python package; same source as ollama/ollama-python repo.

title: ollama
summary: npm landing page for the official ollama JavaScript package; same source as ollama/ollama-js repo.

title: langchain-ai/langchain #ollama
summary: LangChain integration page showing how to use Ollama as an LLM backend for chains, agents, and retrieval pipelines.

title: ollama-webui/ollama-webui
summary: Open-source ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama; manage models and chat in the browser with markdown, code highlighting, and dark mode.

title: otwld/ollama-helm
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart to deploy Ollama server and models on Kubernetes clusters.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker image and compose examples for running Ollama server and pulling models inside containers.

title: ollama-rag-langchain
summary: Minimal RAG template combining Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector store + LangChain retrieval QA.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Community Discord bot that lets users chat with any Ollama model via slash commands.

title: ollama4j
summary: Unofficial Java client for Ollama; generate, chat, and pull models from JVM applications.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Enhanced interactive CLI wrapper around ollama with conversation history, syntax highlighting, and prompt templates.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Simple Flask-based web UI to chat with Ollama models from any browser.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental GitHub Copilot replacement using Ollama for local code completion in VS Code.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack bot that streams answers from Ollama models into threads with optional fine-tuned prompts.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing async bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Unofficial Elixir client for Ollama with GenServer behaviour for streaming responses.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds a side-panel chat powered by any local Ollama model.

title: ollama-ray
summary: Ray example notebook showing distributed fine-tuning and serving of Llama models via Ollama on Ray clusters.
